section_name: Display of Devices: Vehicles Off Roadway
text: The operator of a vehicle described by Section 547.503 (Display of Hazard Lamps) (b) or an explosive cargo vehicle that is stopped entirely on the shoulder at a time and in a place referred to in this subchapter shall place required warning devices on the shoulder as close as practicable to the edge of the roadway.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 547. Vehicle Equip.
##### § 547.506 — Display of Devices: Vehicles Off Roadway

The operator of a vehicle described by Section 547.503 (Display of Hazard Lamps) (b) or an explosive cargo vehicle that is stopped entirely on the shoulder at a time and in a place referred to in this subchapter shall place required warning devices on the shoulder as close as practicable to the edge of the roadway.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
